content:
## Business-Day Handling
Northstar Bank uses the monday_through_friday_no_holiday_calendar for transfer effective dates. For external transfers submitted on a weekend, apply effective date rolls forward to the next business day. For external transfers submitted after the applicable cutoff, apply effective date rolls forward to the next business day. Internal transfers are the exception: internal transfers post on the calendar day of submission, including weekends.

## Transfer Timing
Use the transfer type selected by the customer when quoting posting or delivery:

| Transfer | Cutoff | Delivery | Daily-limit treatment |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Internal transfer between Northstar accounts | none specified | 0 business days | False |
| Standard ACH transfer | 20:00 | 2 business days | True |
| Same-day ACH transfer | 14:00 | 0 business days | True |
| Domestic wire transfer | 16:00 | 0 business days | False |

## Quoting Limits and Fees
Confirm the requested amount fits the transfer type before quoting delivery. Standard ACH transfer has a per-transfer cap of 25000 and fee 0. Same-day ACH transfer has a per-transfer cap of 100000 and fee 2. Domestic wire transfer has a per-transfer cap of 250000 and fee 25. Internal transfer between Northstar accounts has fee 0 and no specified per-transfer cap. See "Transfer Types Fees And Limits Guide" for the fee and limit schedule, and "Internal: Transfer Submission Procedure" before submitting a transfer request.
title: Transfer Cutoff and Delivery Policy
